_description: lint-warn-visibility-advisory summarize/comment script crash. The lint_run step itself succeeded (continue-on-error + `|| true` mask any ESLint exit code), so step outcome stays `success`. The summarize step that runs AFTER lint_run has no continue-on-error, so when it crashes (missing/empty/invalid eslint-report.json, summarize Node script error) the JOB result becomes `failure`. STRICT_GATES catches this via the `lint_result != success/skipped` check. Codex thread 019dfa66 iter-1 finding 3: realistic shape is result=failure + outcome=success, not result=success + outcome=failure.
